title: Fix app blocking pipeline
description: Fix 6 issues in the blocking pipeline: foreground detection only checking MOVE_TO_FOREGROUND, silent exception swallowing, missing SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW permission, no overlay permission in onboarding, deprecated onBackPressed, and Room DB crashes in receivers

title: Add persistent foreground tracking + fix audit docs
description: MonitoringService needs lastKnownForegroundPackage state so detection persists across polls. Also create fixes/05-10 and fixes/00-audit-summary.md documentation.
close_reason: Implemented persistent foreground tracking in MonitoringService + created fix docs 05-10 and audit summary

title: Profile sheet: full-screen bottom sheet with support and settings sections
description: Replace profile navigation with a full-screen ModalBottomSheet. Sections: Support (Get Help, Give Feedback), Screen Time Settings.
close_reason: Profile sheet implemented as full-screen ModalBottomSheet with Support (Get Help, Give Feedback) and Settings (Screen Time Settings) sections

title: Implement Suggested First Intention onboarding screen
description: After Usage Stats permission is granted, query top distracting app and suggest setting an intention. Adds SuggestedIntention screen between PermissionsSetup and NotificationPermission.
close_reason: Implemented SuggestedIntention onboarding screen with ViewModel, UsageStatsRepository.getTopDistractingApp(), and full wiring into onboarding flow

title: Extend UsageStatsRepository with historical data queries
description: Add getDailyAppUsage, getMonthlyAppUsage, getAppOpenEvents methods plus data classes
close_reason: Implemented all 7 files: UsageStatsRepository extensions, Convex schema+mutation, SyncPayloads, SyncManager integration, SyncQueueItem constant, and docs

title: Convex backend: schema + stripe functions + HTTP routes
description: Add subscriptions table to schema, create stripe.ts with internal functions, create http.ts with create-subscription and webhook endpoints, add stripe npm dep
close_reason: Schema, stripe.ts, http.ts, and package.json all implemented

title: Android deps + data layer: Stripe SDK, prefs, SubscriptionManager
description: Add Stripe SDK to build.gradle, enable Google Pay in manifest, init Stripe in BePresentApp, add subscription prefs to PreferencesManager, create SubscriptionManager
close_reason: Stripe SDK, Google Pay, Stripe init, prefs, and SubscriptionManager all implemented

title: Paywall UI: screen type, viewmodel, composable, router wiring
description: Add Paywall to OnboardingScreenType, create PaywallViewModel, create PaywallScreen composable with Stripe PaymentSheet, wire into ScreenRouter, add paywall guard in OnboardingViewModel
close_reason: OnboardingScreenType, PaywallViewModel, PaywallScreen, ScreenRouter, and paywall guard all implemented

title: Post-auth subscription linking in AuthViewModel
description: After Auth0 login, call stripe:linkSubscriptionToUser mutation with deviceId to link anonymous subscription to Convex user
close_reason: Auth linking implemented in AuthViewModel for both login and loginFromCache
